description_long: This object consists of two ornate hardcover books with rich, reddish-burgundy covers adorned with intricate gold floral and scrollwork patterns. The covers have a textured appearance, and the gold detailing is prominent, especially on the front and spine. The books are closed, and their pages have a slightly yellowed, aged look, suggesting they are vintage or antique. The edges of the covers are bordered with gold lines, adding to the decorative effect. The books are stacked, with one lying flat and the other slightly askew on top, allowing a clear view of both the front and side surfaces. No visible text or publisher logos are present on the covers or spines.
description: Two vintage hardcover books with ornate gold floral designs on rich burgundy covers, stacked together. The covers are textured and bordered with gold, giving an antique appearance.
description_view_0: The top and side of both books are visible, highlighting the gold floral patterns and the textured burgundy covers.
description_view_1: The front cover of the lower book is fully visible, showing the detailed gold design, while the top book's side and partial cover are seen.
description_view_2: The spines and top covers of both books are visible, emphasizing the gold border and floral motifs.
description_view_3: The front cover of the top book is most prominent, displaying the ornate gold floral illustration, with the lower book partially visible beneath.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features an elaborate gold floral illustration, with a large central rose surrounded by ornate scrollwork and botanical motifs. The design is symmetrical and decorative, giving the book a classic, antique appearance.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is decorated with gold floral patterns and borders matching the cover, but no text is visible. The design is ornate and consistent with the front cover's style.
